name: RebarSpacing
summary: The RebarSpacing class defines spacing properties for a RebarGuideline.

constructors.name: RebarSpacing
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarSpacing class.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Makes a copy of this object.

methods.name: Create(RebarSpacing.Offset, RebarSpacing.Offset, Int32)
methods.signature: public static RebarSpacing Create(RebarSpacing.Offset startOffset, RebarSpacing.Offset endOffset, int number)
methods.summary: Craetes a spacing defined by number of bars.

methods.name: Create(RebarSpacing.Offset, RebarSpacing.Offset, IEnumerable<RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element>, RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Validation.)
methods.signature: public static RebarSpacing Create(RebarSpacing.Offset startOffset, RebarSpacing.Offset endOffset, IEnumerable<RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Element> elements, out RebarSpacing.ExactSpacing.Validation validation)
methods.summary: Creates an exact spacing if the given elements are valid.

params.name: validation
params.doc: Returns a value indicating the validity of the elements.

methods.name: Create(RebarSpacing.SpacingType, RebarSpacing.Offset, RebarSpacing.Offset, Double)
methods.signature: public static RebarSpacing Create(RebarSpacing.SpacingType type, RebarSpacing.Offset startOffset, RebarSpacing.Offset endOffset, double distance)
methods.summary: Create a spacing which is defined by a single distance.

returns.doc: A RebarSpacing instance if the given type and distance are valid.

methods.name: IsExactFlexibleType
methods.summary: Gets whether the spacing is an exact type with flexible space(s).

returns.doc: True if it is an exact flexible type spacing.

properties.name: EndOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the proposed offset to the last reinforcing bar from the end of the RebarGuideline.

properties.name: EndOffsetIsAutomatic
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the end offset is automatic. When automatic the proposed end offset is calculated to be the concrete cover thickness plus half the reinforcing bar diameter.

properties.name: EndOffsetType
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the end offset is exact or minimum. If the end offset is minimum the spacing algorithm may determine a larger offset.

properties.name: ExactElements
properties.summary: Gets or sets the exact elements of the spacing.

properties.name: ExactSpace
properties.summary: Gets or sets the exact space.

properties.name: ExcludeType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the exclusion of first and last bars.

properties.name: InheritFromPrimary
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the secondary guideline inherits all its spacing properties from the primary guideline. This property is not applicable to a primary guideline.

properties.name: InheritOffsetsFromPrimary
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the secondary guideline inherits its start and end offsets from the primary guideline. This property is not applicable to a primary guideline.

properties.name: NumberOfBars
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of bars in the spacing object.

properties.name: StartOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the proposed offset to the first reinforcing bar from the start of the RebarGuideline.

properties.name: StartOffsetIsAutomatic
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the start offset is automatic. When automatic the proposed start offset is calculated to be the concrete cover thickness plus half the reinforcing bar diameter.

properties.name: StartOffsetType
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the start offset is exact or minimum. If the start offset is minimum the spacing algorithm may determine a larger offset.

properties.name: TargetSpace
properties.summary: Gets or sets the target space.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of spacing. Does not allow change to exact spacing or number bars spacing.

properties.name: Zones
properties.summary: Gets or sets the spacing zones.
